gitCommit.subject: feat(portfolio): pivot to QA Lead / Quality Engineering Lead positioning
gitCommit.body:
feat(portfolio): pivot to QA Lead / Quality Engineering Lead positioning

- index.html: update title, meta, OG, schema.org — all references changed from
  Senior SDET to QA Lead | Quality Engineering Lead
- Hero: updated rotating words and sub-headline to leadership framing
- Hero tags: QA Strategy, Team Leadership, Shift-Left replacing tech-only tags
- About section: rewritten bio and highlight cards to reflect strategic QA lead role
- Experience timeline: Globant/Santander UK now shows QA Lead title and leadership
  bullets; CNN entry updated with full leadership context (team of 3, quality plan,
  KPIs, methodology transformation)
- Skills section: new "Quality Leadership" group added as first category
- Impact section: metrics updated to reflect leadership achievements (4 yrs QA Lead, 95% regression)
- Footer and contact section updated to remove SDET references
- CV.md: synopsis updated to QA Lead framing
- cv.html: already updated to QA Lead layout — included updated PDF
